description: Permissions the Operant shell webview needs. The core sidecar streams every run over the event plugin (operant://bus run/step events, operant://thumb flight-recorder thumbnails, operant://core-status supervision). Without core:event the webview cannot subscribe, so the flight recorder shows nothing while a run streams even though the run records. App-defined commands (core_call and friends) are not ACL gated and work without a listed permission.
